name: SEMPRA
summary: Part I Item 1A. Risk Factors in this report. If any of these risks occur, Sempras and its businesses results of operations, financial condition, cash flows and/or prospects could be materially adversely affected, and the trading price of Sempras securities and those of its businesses could decline.
